title: Create Redstone Link Essentials (CRLE)
description: This project adds some functions to redstone links from the create mod as : The items in links need to have the exact item data(tags, name, minecraft item id) to activate other linked controllers with the frequency. it also adds ID items
body: This create mod add-on modifies the logic of Redstone links, by making them read the item data - name, tags, ect. rather than direct item name - namepsace:itemname for example minecraft:paper. It also adds an ID item that when you right click gives you a personal ID bound to your player UUID.
